## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] Bug fix (corrects an issue)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore (build, CI, dependencies)

## Quality Checklist

- [ ] All tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] No TypeScript errors in strict mode
- [ ] No `any` types in production code
- [ ] No file exceeds 300 LOC (excluding tests)
- [ ] No function exceeds 50 LOC
- [ ] Dependencies at latest stable versions
- [ ] Manual verification of affected endpoints
- [ ] Code follows `docs/architecture/coding-standards.md`
